app.subtitle: AI-powered batch payment processor.
app.tagline: Upload a file, let AI extract payment data, execute on Stellar.

token.label: Token
token.hint: Select the token you want to use for payments.

address.label: Destination address
address.hint: Optional. If set, all payments go to this address. Otherwise, addresses are extracted from the file.

upload.description: Drag & drop or click to upload your payment file
upload.formats: Supported formats: CSV, XLS, XLSX, PDF, TXT

payments.title: Extracted Payments
payments.empty: No payments extracted yet. Upload a file to get started.

errors.UNSUPPORTED_FILE_TYPE: Unsupported file type, allowed: CSV, XLS, XLSX, PDF, TXT
